author: samgg
description: Display a configurable warning banner at the top of notes with a specific tag. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sam Gillet-Garas
manifest.description: Display a configurable warning banner at the top of notes with a specific tag.
manifest.name: Alert Banner

name: Alert Banner

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Alert Banner.

Adds a clear, always-visible banner to the top of any note that has a tag you choose, in both Reading and Editing views.

### Features
- Show a banner on notes with a chosen tag, written inline (`#tag`) or in frontmatter
- Set up to 5 banners, each with its own tag, message, color, and icon
- Pick a preset color or a custom one, plus any [Lucide](https://lucide.dev/icons) icon
- Always visible and not dismissible, so the warning cannot be hidden by accident
